nasb.text: Then Methuselah lived seven hundred and eighty-two years after he became the father of Lamech, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: Methuselah lived after he fathered Lamech 782 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 瑪土撒拉生拉麥以後，還活了七百八十二年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了七百八十二年，生儿育女，

csbs.text: 玛土撒拉生了拉麦之后，又活了七百八十二年，并且生了其他的儿女。
